text.tspan: Setup: agent is run K times
on the same task. Each run
hides reliability gaps in user-facing systems.
Example: K=4 runs on task X
Score: 1 if any run succeeded, else 0
Means: 'with K attempts and an oracle
picking the best, can you solve it?'
('can the model solve it at all?')
Score: 1 only if every run succeeded
N times in a row, every time?'
('will this work in real users' hands?')
